message:
fix edge cases and improve API visibility

glow/browser: handle truncate_string edge cases
- Return empty string for max_width=0
- Return "…" for max_width=1 instead of panicking
- Added tests for edge cases

lipgloss/style: make get_width/get_height public
- Changed visibility from pub(crate) to pub
- Added doc comments and #[must_use] attributes
- Allows external crates to query configured dimensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
